run_summary.summary: Active morning in the inbox! 💼 Liz submitted her SOJOS Sunglasses content for approval today — video is in Ruby's hands. Over on Aleve, there's a snag: brand flagged the VO didn't follow the approved script and the required #AlevePartner disclosures are missing from the first 5 seconds — Liz caught it and said she'll redo it today. JLab payment is still MIA; the manager is chasing accounting since others on the same campaign were paid two weeks ago. On a positive note, the Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign is finally live on Popfly and Kenny confirmed the application is in — store visit is this Thursday. And Picking Daisies Media sent over a new firm offer from Gaia Herbs ($1K-$5K, IG Reel + Stories, May-June) — created a card so you can decide if Liz wants to apply via the Google form. Also saw two non-starters: Outdoorsy RV (gifted/trade only, skipped) and Hulken (Liz asking for samples for ShopMy affiliate, not a deal).

suggestions.message: Liz said she'd redo the VO today and add #AlevePartner disclosures. Make sure she's re-submitted before end of day — the brand is already watching.
Payment is late — manager expects to hear from JLab accounting tomorrow (Apr 23). If no word by EOD Thursday, worth a direct follow-up nudge.
Store visit to Steinhafels is Thursday between 11:30-12pm. Make sure Liz is prepped and knows the shoot plan.

PDM sent a firm offer — $1K-$5K for 1x IG Reel + Stories, May-June. Needs to be applied via Google form using Liz's PDM-provided email. Deadline not specified but PDM said to submit ASAP. Does Liz want in?

deals.next_action: Wait for Ruby at SOJOS to approve content draft
deals.notes: [Apr 22]: Content submitted to Ruby at SOJOS for approval — video via Google Drive, caption tags @sojosvision with 10% discount code MISSLIZSOJOS. Awaiting feedback within 24 hours per their process.

deals.notes: [Apr 22]: Flexsteel campaign now live on Popfly — campaign status shows 'in progress' on Liz's dashboard, application confirmed complete. Store visit to Steinhafels scheduled for Thursday Apr 24, arriving 11:30-12pm. Popfly contact: Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com).

deals.next_action: Decide whether to apply — submit via PDM Google form using Liz's PDM-provided email
deals.notes: [Apr 22]: FIRM OFFER from Picking Daisies Media — Gaia Herbs. Deliverables: 1x IG Story (3 frames) + 1x IG Story Reminder Frame + 1x IG Reel (45-60s collab post). Budget: $1,000-$5,000. Timeline: May + June 2026. Usage: 30-day link in bio + organic/paid whitelisting for 30 days. Exclusivity: 1 week before/during/after content in herbal supplement space. Target profile: wellness/health/holistic/low-tox influencers. Must apply via Google form using PDM-provided email. Cannot partner with pregnant or breastfeeding creators.
